title.en: 2 Bedroom Condo for sale at Chapter One Midtown Ladprao 24
title.zh: 2 Bedroom Condo for sale at Chapter One Midtown Ladprao 24
title.th: 2 Bedroom Condo for sale at Chapter One Midtown Ladprao 24

summary.th: ขาย: 2 นอน 58 ตร.ม. ราคา 6,180,000 บาท (DotProperty #f2ae98190015-33a1-7092-c6b5-7ac3e089)

description.en:
Chapter One Midtown Ladprao 24 | Owner Sale
Size: 58.44 sqmFloor: 9th floorView: City view, North
A well-maintained corner unit at Chapter One Midtown Ladprao 24, offered directly by the owner.The unit features a 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom layout, providing good privacy, natural light, and comfortable living space.
Located just 2 minutes’ walk to MRT Ladprao and the Yellow [hidden line], offering excellent connectivity and daily convenience.
PROPERTY HIGHLIGHTS
• Corner unit – more privacy & natural light• 2 Bedrooms | 2 Bathrooms• 58.44 sqm usable area• 9th floor with city view• Functional layout, airy and bright• Direct owner sale• Walk 2 minutes to MRT Ladprao & Yellow [hidden line]• Infinity pool on 36th floor• Tennis court• Fitness center• Rooftop garden• Well-managed residential project
NEARBY LOCATIONS
(Approx. travel times)
• MRT Ladprao – 2 min walk• Yellow [hidden line] – 2 min walk• Central Ladprao – 5 min• Union Mall – 5 min• Chatuchak Park – 10 min• Major Ratchayothin – 10 min• JJ Mall / JJ Green – 10 min• Vibhavadi-Rangsit Road – Easy access• Phahonyothin Road – Easy access• Don Mueang Airport – approx. 20–25 min
Suitable for own stay or long-term investment
